name: Compensating Tinnitus from Job Noise

mainEntity.name: Does tinnitus from workplace noise count as compensable in Draper factories?
mainEntity.text: Does tinnitus from workplace noise count as compensable in Draper factories?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if medically linked to NIHL; Utah comp treats tinnitus as scheduled impairment or PPD, often 5-15% rating added to hearing loss awards.

suggestedAnswer.text: Tinnitus bolsters claims, rated separately via AMA guides. Draper manufacturing sees frequent pairings; subjective symptoms need objective tests. Insurers undervalue; specialist reports elevate settlements. Include in initial filings for comprehensive recovery.[1]

description: Yes, if medically linked to NIHL; Utah comp treats tinnitus as scheduled impairment or PPD, often 5-15% rating added to hearing loss awards.
